gameDetails.name: Oh My Goods!
gameDetails.description:
In Oh My Goods!, first released as Royal Goods, players are European artisans during the Middle Ages who produce tools, barrels, glass windows, and many other goods. Only if you make clever use of your production chains will you have the most victory points at the end of the game.

Oh My Goods! is a worker placement game where players use randomly generated raw materials to produce goods and buildings and hire assistants, getting Victory Points.

The game is played in a series of rounds. It enters the final round when one player has 8 buildings (including their Charburner). Points for buildings and assistants are totaled.  The player with the most victory points, wins.
